## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` produces no errors or warnings
- [ ] Every new quiz question is covered by that lesson's `content[]`
- [ ] No hard-coded colour values added outside `CodeBlock.css`
- [ ] `APP_VERSION` in `src/config.js` bumped if lesson content changed
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode
- [ ] Tested on a narrow viewport (≤ 480 px)
